name: Fred Hopkins
abstract: Fred Hopkins (October 11, 1947 – January 7, 1999) was an American double bassist who played a major role in the development of the avant-garde jazz movement. He was best known for his association with the trio Air with Henry Threadgill and Steve McCall, and for his numerous performances and extensive recordings with major jazz musicians …

concerts.label: Jazz: The Personal Dimension: Dewey Redman Quartet
Kool Jazz Festival: The Young Lions

works.t: What Ever Happened To The Dream Deferred

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: And then Air with Threadgill, Steve McCall and Fred Hopkins. Yeah, that was a great group.
